title: The Vanishing of the Great Pyramids

scenes.text: An ancient site shrouded in mystery and disappearance.
It is located in Giza, Egypt, a marvel of the ancient world.
The Great Pyramids were built thousands of years ago and still intrigue historians today.
While theories abound, the means of construction remain a topic of mystery.
scenes.label: MEANS STILL A MYSTERY

scenes.text: Follow for a new cold case every day.

description: 📍 Giza, Egypt - Thousands of years ago. The great pyramids remain one of history's greatest marvels, but many of their secrets are still locked in time. Follow for daily cold cases!
